system.description:
You shift your consciousness into a consenting Creature.

Your body enters a helpless, catatonic state during this time and you instead control the host body, utilising it's skills and traits, with the addition of retained access to your @Trait[aura] perks. You can end this effect at any time using a Complex Action.

If the host is @Affliction[fainted] while your consciousness is present, your own body also gains a stack of @Affliction[weary]. If the user dies while shifted, this would typically sever the connection. GMs may wish to consider instead making the shift permanent.

actions.name: Shift Consciousness
